Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations read with SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated 30th January 2026, we wish to inform you that as per the Communication made by Crisil ESG Ratings & Analytics Ltd ( Crisil ESG Ratings ) on July 21, 2026, the Company has been assigned an ESG Rating of  68 .Please note that the Company had not engaged Crisil ESG Ratings for the ESG Rating. Crisil ESG Ratings has independently prepared the report based on data pertaining to the Company available in the public domain. |SUBJECT: General Updates
